description_long: This is a long, slender loaf of bread resembling a traditional French baguette. The crust is golden-brown with a dusting of flour and features diagonal scoring marks along its length, giving it a rustic, artisanal appearance. The surface texture is slightly rough and matte, with visible ridges and valleys from the scoring. The ends of the loaf are rounded and taper slightly, while the body maintains a consistent cylindrical shape. The bread appears unsliced and whole, with no visible packaging or branding. Its coloration transitions from pale beige to deeper brown tones, especially along the scored ridges.
description: A rustic, unsliced baguette with a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust and diagonal scoring marks. The loaf is long, slender, and slightly tapered at the ends.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen at an angle, highlighting the diagonal scoring and flour-dusted crust.
description_view_1: A side profile shows the full length and cylindrical shape, with less emphasis on the scoring.
description_view_2: The opposite end is visible, showing the rounded tip and some surface texture.
description_view_3: A clear side view displays the length, scoring pattern, and the contrast between the crust and the flour dusting.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features diagonal scoring marks and a light dusting of flour, giving it a rustic, artisanal look. The surface is uneven with visible ridges and valleys from the scoring.
